title: With Leo and Bad Bunny touring Madrid, the bigger star might be the pope
summary_full: The previously stoic pope is drawing huge crowds and seems to be making a star turn, enthralling the faithful with emotive assurance.
summary_public: The previously stoic pope is drawing huge crowds and seems to be making a star turn, enthralling the faithful with emotive assurance.
